video: Video 1: Full USD Scene Workflow from Scratch (12:17)

node_sequence.description: Defines Xform hierarchy for scene organization
node_sequence.notes: Creates the root scene hierarchy. Set Kind=Group for proper hierarchy delegation. Creates child Xforms for /shot/geo, /shot/LGT, /shot/MTL, /shot/cam.

node_sequence.description: Imports or creates geometry into the USD stage
node_sequence.notes: Inside the SOP Create: geometry + Name attribute + Output node. The Name attribute gives geometry identity in the USD hierarchy. The Output node ensures export regardless of display flag. Can substitute SOP Import for existing geometry.
Drag camera into viewport, Lock, then Pilot to position interactively.

node_sequence.description: Contains Karma Material Builder nodes for shading
node_sequence.notes: Inside: one Karma Material Builder (KMB) per material, named per asset. Use Auto-fill Materials to assign geometry per material.

node_sequence.description: Adds physical sky lighting to the scene
node_sequence.notes: Standard environment light for Karma scenes.

node_sequence.description: Configures Karma render engine and resolution
node_sequence.notes: Created via the 'Karma' setup node which produces 2 nodes (render settings + render properties). Set resolution here. Karma XPU = GPU rendering.
References settings from Karma Render Settings above. Click 'Render to Disk' to execute.

constraints: Chain SOP imports sequentially — NEVER merge. This relates to USD layer composition ordering.
Always add an Output node inside SOP Create to ensure name attribute and operations export correctly regardless of display flag.
Name attribute inside SOPs gives geometry identity in the USD hierarchy.
Primitive Kind must be set to 'Group' on Xforms in the Primitive LOP for proper hierarchy.
Save scene (Ctrl+S) to dismiss import warnings after initial setup.
Primitive paths follow the convention: /shot/{category}/$OS where category is geo, LGT, MTL, or cam.
test_criteria: Create the full 7-node chain from Primitive to USD Render ROP. Verify: (1) Scene Outliner shows /shot with geo, LGT, MTL, cam children. (2) All primitive paths resolve correctly with $OS substitution. (3) Karma XPU engine is selected. (4) Render output produces an image at $HIP/render/$HIPNAME.png. (5) Chain is sequential with no merge nodes.

template_creation.description: After building the network, delete specific geometry/materials, leave skeleton with paths intact. Drag into Shelf Tab, name it, set input=Primitive LOP, output=USD Render ROP, assign hotkey.
